dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Phew, looks like Derry is going to get away safely.

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: What was that terrifying thing chasing him?

dialogueLines.Speaker: Chime
dialogueLines.text: Whatever, it's gone now. Good job, Echo! There are others you can help in the Astral Plane, let's go see about them.
